step0.title: How do you want to get started?

step1.title: Welcome to Stocka!

step3.title: Tell us about your business
step3.subtitle: This information helps us personalize Stocka for you
step3.businessNameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters

step4.title: Storage spaces
step4.subtitle: Organize your inventory by physical locations
step4.warehouseCardDescription: Your first space to organize your inventory

step5.title: Tell us a little more
step5.subtitle: This information helps us give you better recommendations (optional)
step5.teamSizeLabel: How many people work in your business?
step5.revenueLabel: What is your approximate monthly revenue?

step6.item3: Set up your first storage space

step7.title: Your business is ready!

codeEntry.title: Invitation code
codeEntry.subtitle: Enter the code your team administrator shared with you
codeEntry.codeInvalid: Code must be exactly 8 alphanumeric characters

errors.INVALID_CODE: This code is not valid. Please check that you typed it correctly.
errors.EXPIRED_CODE: This invitation code has expired. Ask the administrator for a new one.
errors.ALREADY_USED: This code has already been used.
errors.UNKNOWN: An error occurred while validating the code. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Confirm your invitation
confirmation.subtitle: You have been invited to join this team
